The Avengers (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $623,357,910Details
International Box Office $891,742,301
Worldwide Box Office $1,515,100,211
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $120,905,825
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $131,728,301
Total $252,634,126
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When an unexpected enemy emerges that threatens global safety and security, Nick Fury, Director of the international peacekeeping agency known as S.H.I.E.L.D., finds himself in need of a team to pull the world back from the brink of disaster. Spanning the globe, a daring recruitment effort begins.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$207,438,708 (33.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$225,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,349 opening theaters/4,349 max. theaters, 8.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $936,603,088

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 4th, 2012 (Wide) by Walt Disney
May 4th, 2012 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
May 2nd, 2013 (Special Engagement) by Regal Entertainment
International Releases: April 25th, 2012 (Wide) (Belgium)
April 25th, 2012 (Wide) (France)
April 25th, 2012 (Wide) (Australia)
April 25th, 2012 (Wide) (Taiwan)
April 25th, 2012 (Wide) (Portugal)
Video Release: September 25th, 2012 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi violence and action throughout, and a mild drug reference.
(Rating bulletin 2220, 4/25/2012)
Running Time: 143 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Avengers
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Epilogue, Franchise Crossover, Gratuitous Cameos, Motion Capture Performance, Scene in End Credits, Sequel With Lead Character Recast, Visual Effects

Synopsis

When an unexpected enemy emerges that threatens global safety and security, Nick Fury, Director of the international peacekeeping agency known as S.H.I.E.L.D., finds himself in need of a team to pull the world back from the brink of disaster. Spanning the globe, a daring recruitment effort begins.
